title: Orbital Strike+
description: Turn fishing rods into orbital weapons. 6 ordnance systems.
body: # OrbitalStrike+ 22 orbital weapon systems for Minecraft. Cast and destroy. ## Features 22 fishing rod-based orbital weapons across 3 categories, plus **13 bedrock-piercing Stab variants**. ### TNT Weapons | Weapon | Description | |--------|-------------| | **Stab Shot** | TNT column from sky to bedrock. Instant explosions. | | **Nuke Shot** | Expanding TNT rings. Customizable ring count. Supports simultaneous / inward / outward explosion order. | | **Compressed Nuke** | Organized circular bombardment with even spacing. Supports simultaneous / inward / outward explosion order. | | **Cluster Strike** | Multi-point carpet bombing. Spawns multiple nuke clusters across a wide area. | | **Cross Shot** | Cross-shaped TNT bombardment. | | **X Shot** | Diagonal cross TNT bombardment. | | **Ring Shot** | Donut-shaped TNT bombardment. | | **Line Shot** | Linear TNT trench in the direction you face. | | **Hexagon Shot** | Hexagonal TNT bombardment. | | **Pentagon Shot** | Pentagonal TNT bombardment. | | **Star Shot** | 5-pointed star TNT bombardment. | | **Star of David** | Hexagram TNT bombardment. | | **Heart Shot** | Heart-shaped TNT bombardment. | | **Scatter Shot** | Carpet bombing with random clusters. | | **Grid Shot** | Grid-pattern TNT bombardment. | | **Text Shot** | Write text in TNT explosions! Supports all languages (Unicode). | ### Stab Variants (Bedrock-Piercing) All major shapes have a **Stab** variant that punches TNT columns from sky to bedrock at every point in the pattern. | Stab Weapon | Description | |-------------|-------------| | **Circle Stab** | Concentric ring pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Cross Stab** | Cross pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **X Stab** | X-shape pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Ring Stab** | Ring pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Trench Stab** | Line pattern, sky-to-bedrock trench | | **Hexagon Stab** | Hexagon pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Pentagon Stab** | Pentagon pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Star Stab** | Star pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Star of David Stab** | Hexagram pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Heart Stab** | Heart pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Scatter Stab** | Random cluster pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Grid Stab** | Grid pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | | **Text Stab** | Text pattern, sky-to-bedrock columns | ### Entity Weapons | Weapon | Description | |--------|-------------| | **Orbital Wolf** | Spawn armored wolves with buffs. They fight for you. | | **Orbital Golem** | Spawn iron golem army. | | **Orbital Wither** | Summon the Wither. | ### Utility | Weapon | Description | |--------|-------------| | **Stasis** | Teleport to saved coordinates. | | **Stasis Aim** | Point and teleport. No commands needed. | | **Railgun** | High-velocity arrow barrage from above. 1500 damage per arrow. | All weapons support **Infinity Mode** - reusable and never breaks. ## Commands Requires OP permissions. ### Execute Attacks ``` /ob stab /ob nuke [rings] [inward|outward] /ob compressed_nuke [rings] [inward|outward] /ob cross [size] /ob x_shot [size] /ob ring [inner] [outer] /ob line [length] /ob hexagon [size] /ob pentagon [size] /ob star [size] /ob star_of_david [size] /ob heart [size] /ob scatter [radius] [clusters] /ob grid [size] [spacing] /ob text /ob cluster [count] [radius] [rings] /ob wolves /ob golems /ob wither /ob stasis /ob stasis_aim /ob help ``` ### Stab Commands ``` /ob circle_stab [rings] /ob cross_stab [size] /ob x_stab [size] /ob ring_stab [size] /ob trench_stab [length] /ob hexagon_stab [size] /ob pentagon_stab [size] /ob star_stab [size] /ob star_of_david_stab [size] /ob heart_stab [size] /ob scatter_stab [size] /ob grid_stab [size] /ob text_stab ``` ### Get Weapons ``` /ob give [amount] [params] [true|false] ``` Examples: ``` /ob give cluster 1 5 30 2 true - Infinite cluster strike, 5 clusters, radius 30, 2 rings each /ob give nuke 1 10 true - Infinite nuke with 10 rings /ob give nuke 1 10 inward true - Infinite nuke, outside-first explosion /ob give compressed_nuke 1 5 outward - Compressed nuke, inside-first explosion /ob give wolf 1 50 - 50 wolves per use /ob give heart 1 15 true - Infinite heart shot, size 15 /ob give text 1 3 HELLO - Text shot that writes "HELLO" /ob give text 1 3 true HELLO - Infinite text shot /ob give golem 1 10 - 10 golems per use /ob give railgun 1 200 5 true - Infinite railgun, 200 arrows /ob give circle_stab 1 5 - Bedrock-piercing circle stab, 5 rings /ob give text_stab 1 3 true Hello - Infinite bedrock-piercing text stab ``` Supports relative coordinates (`~`, `~10`, etc.) ## Requirements - Minecraft 1.16.5 ~ 1.21.11 + 26.1.2 - Fabric Loader - Fabric API ## Links **YouTube:** [MC clip](https://youtube.com/channel/UCGrw0wd3fF-l-m3wfCLbFKw) Subscribe for updates and tutorials! --- # 日本語 22種類の軌道兵器＋13種のスタブ版を追加するMOD。 ## 武器一覧 ### TNT兵器 | 武器 | 説明 | |------|------| | **Stab Shot** | 空から岩盤までTNTの柱 | | **Nuke Shot** | 円形に広がるTNT爆撃。同時爆発/内側から/外側から を選択可能 | | **Compressed Nuke** | 等間隔で整列した円形爆撃。同時爆発/内側から/外側から を選択可能 | | **Cluster Strike** | 複数拠点への多点クラスター爆撃 | | **Cross Shot** | 十字型TNT爆撃 | | **X Shot** | 斜め十字TNT爆撃 | | **Ring Shot** | ドーナツ型TNT爆撃 | | **Line Shot** | 視線方向への直線TNT爆撃 | | **Hexagon Shot** | 六角形TNT爆撃 | | **Pentagon Shot** | 五角形TNT爆撃 | | **Star Shot** | 星型TNT爆撃 | | **Star of David** | 六芒星TNT爆撃 | | **Heart Shot** | ハート型TNT爆撃 | | **Scatter Shot** | ランダムなクラスター絨毯爆撃 | | **Grid Shot** | 格子状TNT爆撃 | | **Text Shot** | テキストをTNTで描く！多言語対応（Unicode） | ### スタブ版（岩盤貫通） 主要な形状すべてに**スタブ版**があり、パターンの各点に空から岩盤までTNTの柱を生成します。 | スタブ武器 | 説明 | |------------|------| | **Circle Stab** | 同心円パターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Cross Stab** | 十字パターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **X Stab** | X字パターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Ring Stab** | リングパターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Trench Stab** | 直線パターンで岩盤まで貫通（トレンチ） | | **Hexagon Stab** | 六角形パターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Pentagon Stab** | 五角形パターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Star Stab** | 星型パターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Star of David Stab** | 六芒星パターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Heart Stab** | ハートパターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Scatter Stab** | ランダムクラスターで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Grid Stab** | 格子パターンで岩盤まで貫通 | | **Text Stab** | テキストパターンで岩盤まで貫通 | ### エンティティ兵器 | 武器 | 説明 | |------|------| | **Orbital Wolf** | 装甲+バフ付きオオカミ召喚 | | **Orbital Golem** | アイアンゴーレム軍団召喚 | | **Orbital Wither** | ウィザー召喚 | ### ユーティリティ | 武器 | 説明 | |------|------| | **Stasis** | 座標にテレポート | | **Stasis Aim** | 見た場所にテレポート | | **Railgun** | 上空から超高速矢の雨（1本1500ダメージ） | **∞ 無限モード** - 何度でも使える ## コマンド OP権限が必要。`/ob help`で一覧表示。 ### 使用例 ``` /ob give cluster 1 5 30 2 true - 無限クラスター爆撃 /ob give nuke 1 10 true - 無限核爆撃、10リング /ob give nuke 1 10 inward true - 外側から順に爆発、無限 /ob give nuke 1 10 outward true - 内側から順に爆発、無限 /ob give compressed_nuke 1 5 inward true - 外側から順に爆発、無限 /ob give wolf 1 50 - 1回で50匹召喚 /ob give heart 1 15 true - 無限ハート爆撃、サイズ15 /ob give text 1 3 HELLO - "HELLO"のテキスト爆撃 /ob give text 1 3 true HELLO - 無限テキスト爆撃 /ob give golem 1 10 - ゴーレム10体 /ob give railgun 1 200 5 true - 無限レールガン、矢200本 /ob give circle_stab 1 5 - 同心円スタブ、5リング /ob give text_stab 1 3 true Hello - 無限テキストスタブ ``` ## 対応バージョン Minecraft 1.16.5 ~ 1.21.11 + 26.1.2 (Fabric) ## YouTube **チャンネル:** [MCクリップ](https://youtube.com/channel/UCGrw0wd3fF-l-m3wfCLbFKw) チャンネル登録よろしく！
